flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Northern Essex Community College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.5k → $6.7k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Northern Essex Community College fell 16% between 2006 and 2009 (15.7% → 13.2%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Northern Essex Community College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.3k → $12.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northern Essex Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9% → 0.0%).
